display_name: Product Sales By POS Type Hourly
author: Claude Code
description: Hourly sales breakdown by POS Type (Pod) with YoY comparison for a single day
expected_rows: ~100 (24 hours × N pods + N Total Day rows)

Date.description: NZ Date for the report (single day)

SelectedView.description: View type: D=Dollar Sales, G=Guest Count, A=Average Check

key_features: Three view modes (Sales, GC, Av Chq)
parent_screen: Product Sales By Register Type List
notes: Pod codes will be converted to full names using GetPODFullName server action in OutSystems
